channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Telecel creditors and owners to vote on a rescue plan @Techzim
item.description: On Friday, 24 July 2026, the people Telecel owes money to, and the people who own it (the government through Mutapa), will meet to vote on a plan to save the company. It’s at the Harare Showgrounds, in the Andy Millar Hall, at 10am. Grant Thornton, who are doing the ‘corporate rescue” process, made the [...] The post Telecel creditors and owners to vote on a rescue plan appeared first on Techzim. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Techzim

item.title: Zimbabwe, China deepen cooperation on liberation war veterans’ welfare @bulawayo24
item.description: BEIJING – Zimbabwe and China have agreed to strengthen cooperation in veterans’ affairs following high‐level discussions between the Minister of Veterans of the Liberation Struggle Affairs, Senator Mo... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Maoneke calls for integrated government systems to improve service delivery @bulawayo24
item.description: VICTORIA FALLS - Chairperson of the Parliamentary Portfolio Committee on Defence, Home Affairs, Security Services and War Veterans Affairs, Exevia Moses Maoneke, has urged Government to accelerate the... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: More than 6,100 babies, 563 mothers died in Zimbabwe during 2025 @nehandaradio
item.description: Zimbabwe recorded 6,177 neonatal deaths and 563 maternal deaths in 2025, with Health Minister Douglas Mombeshora citing birth asphyxia, infections and postpartum haemorrhage as the leading causes. The post More than 6,100 babies, 563 mothers died in Zimbabwe during 2025 appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Thomas Mapfumo’s Family Reveal He Suffered A Stroke After Chivayo’s Statements Coercing Him To Take His Money
item.description: By A Correspondent | ANALYSIS | ZimEye | The legendary singer, Thomas Mapfumo suffered a stroke, his family has told... Continue reading "Thomas Mapfumo’s Family Reveal He Suffered A Stroke After Chivayo’s Statements Coercing Him To Take His Money" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: 6 people die as mum and her 2 young kids survive deadly kombi and Toyota probox head-on accident
item.description: Chinhoyi Carnage: Six Lives Lost, Mother and Children Miraculously Survive in Horrific Head-on Collision CHINHOYI – A devastating head-on collision near the Chinhoyi Provincial Heroes Acre along the Harare-Chirundu Highway yesterday claimed the lives of six individuals, casting a sombre shadow over the nation. Amidst the wreckage and despair, a glimmer of hope emerged as [...] The post 6 people die as mum and her 2 young kids survive deadly kombi and Toyota probox head-on accident first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Of gifts, Zanu PF capture, and the animated noise @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: ‘Through it all, Zanu PF must never be allowed to corrupt our moral fibre’ The post Of gifts, Zanu PF capture, and the animated noise appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Fastjet Zimbabwe leases Airbus A320-200 for peak travel period @3menonaboat
item.description:
The aircraft is expected to enter service on 1 August 2026

The post Fastjet Zimbabwe leases Airbus A320-200 for peak travel period first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: When Zimbabweans push back: What would SA do if Beitbridge shut them out? @bulawayo24
item.description: The current "Abahambe" climate in South Africa has forced thousands of Zimbabweans to return home, many of them abruptly and under hostile conditions. But imagine, for a moment, that these same Zimbab... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Six People Killed in Tragic Harare-Chirundu Road Crash, Police Investigate @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: Six People Killed in Tragic Harare-Chirundu Road Crash, Police Investigate Six people lost their lives in a devastating road accident along the Harare-Chirundu Road on Thursday afternoon, with police launching investigations into the circumstances surrounding the crash. The fatal collision occurred near the 110-kilometre peg, close to Heroes Acre, according to the Zimbabwe Republic Police [...] The post Six People Killed in Tragic Harare-Chirundu Road Crash, Police Investigate appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Massive HIV Time Bomb as 100,000 Zimbabweans Flee South Africa in Just One Month
item.description: Harare – A looming public health crisis threatens Zimbabwe as an unprecedented exodus of its citizens from South Africa, estimated at 100,000 in a single month, strains an already fragile healthcare system. Many of these returnees, fleeing xenophobic attacks and a tightening bureaucratic squeeze, are living with HIV, raising grave concerns among lawmakers and health [...] The post Massive HIV Time Bomb as 100,000 Zimbabweans Flee South Africa in Just One Month first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: 5 rounds of lula lula get ZAOGA Church Elder sentenced to 13 years in UK Prison... but then he fled!
item.description: Leeds, UK – A prominent elder within the Zimbabwe Assemblies of God Africa (ZAOGA) church, Innocent Majoni, has been handed a 13-year prison sentence for the rape and sexual assault of a vulnerable woman in the United Kingdom. The 47-year-old Zimbabwean national, however, remains at large, having failed to appear for his sentencing at Leeds [...] The post 5 rounds of lula lula get ZAOGA Church Elder sentenced to 13 years in UK Prison... but then he fled! first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bulawayo’s 159-bed complex houses nearly 1 000 people @bulawayo24
item.description: Bulawayo’s ageing workers’ hostels, originally built in the 1950s to accommodate single male industrial workers, have evolved into severely overcrowded family settlements, with one complex designed fo... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Bata’s production capacity surges @bulawayo24
item.description: Footwear manufacturer Bata Shoe Company has increased production capacity utilisation from 27 percent to 42 percent and is targeting 65 percent as improved currency stability and growing demand for lo... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe clinics sit on unused Starlink kits @bulawayo24
item.description: Hundreds of hospitals and clinics across Zimbabwe have been equipped with Starlink satellite internet kits under a government drive to improve healthcare connectivity, but many facilities are unable t... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News
